hooks.command: echo '--- sprint-kit scope 상태 ---' && cat scopes/*/scope.md 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo '활성 scope가 없습니다.'

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'surface/preview'; then npx tsx scripts/visual-qa.ts --surface-path "$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path' | xargs dirname | xargs dirname)" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
